landing.tagline: A new standard for medical staffing

login.title: Log in to Medinoti
login.subtitle: Connecting you with healthcare, Medinoti
login.errEmailNotConfirmed:
Your email hasn't been verified yet.

Please click the link in the verification email you received at sign-up, then log in again.
If you don't see it, please check your spam folder.

footer.descriptionLine1: A map-based matching platform that connects hospitals and medical professionals quickly and reliably
footer.descriptionLine2: (Dental hygienists, nurses, and nursing assistants — jobs & candidates)
footer.addressValue: SmileUp Office, 247 Guwol-ro, Namdong-gu, Incheon, Korea

dashboard.selectHospitalType: Select a hospital type to view:
dashboard.rangeLegend: Shown based on the commuting range set by each professional.
dashboard.numberMasked: The number is masked to protect privacy.
dashboard.smsMessage: Hello, I'm reaching out after seeing your profile on Medinoti.
dashboard.noSmsHelpKakao: * This hospital has no text number. Please use the KakaoTalk inquiry on the posting above.
dashboard.smsMobileHelp: * You can send texts on a mobile device.

myJobs.title: My Job Postings
myJobs.emptyState: You haven't posted any jobs yet.
myJobs.needsUpdateWarning: A new field (job category) is empty. Tap "Edit" to fill it in.

jobForm.postSubtitle: Enter the position, schedule, and hourly pay
jobForm.legacyEmptyWarning: This job posting is missing an updated required field (such as job position). Please fill in all fields to save.
jobForm.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Looking for a dental hygienist for temporary coverage
jobForm.alwaysModeDescPost: You're hiring ongoing staff with no fixed dates. Feel free to note your preferred days/times in the description field.
jobForm.alwaysModeDescEdit: You're hiring ongoing staff with no fixed dates.
jobForm.wageNegotiableLabel: Hourly pay negotiable (exact amount to be confirmed at interview/consultation)
jobForm.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g.) Experience assisting with implant surgery preferred. Hourly pay negotiable based on skill level (typically KRW 20,000-40,000).
jobForm.noHospitalMobileHint: No mobile number is registered for this hospital. Register one in the info edit screen or enter it directly below.
jobForm.phoneCustomOption: Use a different number for this posting only
jobForm.kakaoHint: If left blank, only the text message button will be shown.
jobForm.notFoundMessage: Job posting not found or you don't have access.
jobForm.errCategoryCustomRequired: Please enter the custom position name.
jobForm.errScheduleIncomplete: For a specific schedule, please fill in both the work date and time.
jobForm.errEndDateBeforeStart: The end date cannot be earlier than the start date.
jobForm.errEndTimeBeforeStart: For the same day, the end time must be later than the start time.
jobForm.errWageRequired: Please enter an hourly pay or select "Hourly pay negotiable".
jobForm.errCustomPhoneRequired: Please enter the new phone number to receive contact.
jobForm.errKakaoInvalid: The KakaoTalk link must be a valid address starting with http(s)://.
jobForm.postSuccess: Job posting has been registered successfully!

workerForm.addressPrivacyHint: Your detailed address is not shown publicly and is only used to calculate distance.
workerForm.agreeRequired: Please agree to all required terms.
workerForm.bioHint: A good one-line summary gets you a lot more job offers.
workerForm.careerHint: Enter your work period and hospital name for each line.
workerForm.deleteConfirmMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?

• Your profile information will be deleted immediately.
• However, under applicable law the following records are retained for a period:
  - Contract/withdrawal records: 5 years
  - Consumer complaint/dispute records: 3 years
  - Access logs: 3 months
workerForm.deleteErrorPrefix: An error occurred while deleting your account:
workerForm.deleteSuccess: Your account has been deleted. Thank you for using Medinoti.
workerForm.name: Name
workerForm.notesPlaceholder: Feel free to write about your duties, skills, and self-introduction.
workerForm.phonePublicHint: This number will be shown to hospital members for job offers.
workerForm.privacyRight1: You can view and edit your personal information directly in the form above.
workerForm.privacyRight2: You can request deletion of your personal information by deleting your account.

hospitalForm.registerSubtitle: Register your exact location using the map
hospitalForm.manualModeHelp: If you can't find your hospital, please enter it manually.
hospitalForm.mobileHintPrefix: Enter your mobile number so professionals can
hospitalForm.mobileHintSuffixRegister: for faster matching. If you only use a landline (02/032 etc.), you can leave this blank.
hospitalForm.mobileHintSuffixEdit: for faster matching. If you only use a landline, you can leave this blank.
hospitalForm.privacyBullet1: You can view and edit your hospital information directly in the form above.
hospitalForm.privacyBullet2: You can request deletion of your personal data by deleting your account.
hospitalForm.deleteSectionPrompt: Would you like to stop using the service?
hospitalForm.deleteConfirmMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?

• Your hospital information and job postings will be deleted immediately.
• However, the following records will be retained for a set period as required by law:
  - Contract/withdrawal records: 5 years
  - Consumer complaint/dispute records: 3 years
  - Access logs: 3 months
hospitalForm.deleteSuccessAlert: Your account has been deleted. Thank you for using our service.
hospitalForm.errDeleteFailedPrefix: An error occurred while deleting your account:

consent.privacyLabel: [Required] Consent to collection and use of personal information
consent.termsLabel: [Required] Agree to the Terms of Service
consent.ageLabel: [Required] I am 14 years of age or older
consent.thirdPartyLabel: [Optional] Consent to third-party provision (share contact with hospitals)
consent.thirdPartyDesc: For job offers, your name, contact number, and license type will be disclosed to hospital members. You can sign up without agreeing, and you can change this anytime from your dashboard.
consent.privacyModalTitle: Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Information
consent.privacyIntroRest: collects and uses personal information as follows to provide the service.
consent.collectItemsValue: Name, phone number, address, email, password, license information (medical staff), business information (hospitals)
consent.collectPurposeValue: Job matching, member management, service provision
consent.retentionValue: Until membership withdrawal (statutory retention periods apply separately)
consent.privacyWarn: You may refuse consent, but service use will be restricted.
consent.article1Body: These terms govern the conditions and procedures for using the Medinoti service operated by Smile-up Co., Ltd., and the rights and obligations between the company and its members.
consent.article4Body: To register, you agree to these terms and submit the required information in the prescribed form. Registration may be refused for false information, use of another person's identity, or applicants under 14 years of age.
consent.article9Body: Members may withdraw at any time, and some information is retained for a certain period in accordance with relevant laws.
consent.article10Body: The company has no obligation to intervene in disputes between members and does not guarantee the accuracy of posted information.
